_description: Template for creating app metadata files. Replace placeholder values with your domain-specific data.
_usage: Copy this file to your example directory as 'metadata_app.json' and customize.

organizations._comment: Organization is the top-level entity. use_seed=true generates UUID from id string.

tenants._comment: Tenant belongs to Organization. References organization_id.

_notes: password: plaintext in metadata files, hashed on load by the broker
roles: array of role names applied during load. Values: AppAdmin, AppDeveloper, AppUser, TenantAdmin, OrgAdmin
is_active: set false to disable login for this user
tenant_id: the user's home tenant
role: single role name (AppAdmin, AppDeveloper, AppUser, TenantAdmin, OrgAdmin)
scope.type: 'App' (with tenant_id + app_id), 'Tenant' (with tenant_id), 'Organization' (with org_id)
assigned_by: user_id of who created this assignment
CRITICAL: scope.org_id for Organization scope, NOT organization_id

description.en: Description of what your application does
Description of what this module handles

modules._comment: Modules define event contracts (subscribed/publishable events). Optional but recommended for authorization.

apps._comment: App belongs to Tenant. All domain entities (universals, computations, etc.) reference app_id.

description.en: Base unit description
Alternative unit with conversion factor

measurement_frames._comment: Custom measurement frames. Standard frames (std-currency, std-quantity, std-ratio, std-integer) are defined in foundation. universal_id MUST reference a quantity-kind universal from foundation.

description.en: Description of what this entity represents

_notes: temporal_nature: 'Endurant' (persistent) or 'Perdurant' (temporal/event)
meta_category: 'Kind' (entity type), 'Role', 'Quality', 'Mode', 'Phase', 'Relator', 'Event', 'Process'
generalizes: optional - ID of parent universal for inheritance hierarchy
label_schema: defines how instance labels are generated from property values
separator: string to join label parts (default: ' - ')
max_length: maximum label length before truncation (default: 40)
fallback_language: language to use if requested language not found (default: 'en')

description.en: Enumeration universal for status values - instances define the allowed values

_notes: Enumeration universals define a set of allowed values via instances
Each instance represents one enum value (e.g., ACTIVE, PENDING, CLOSED)
Properties can reference this universal via reference_universal_id
Instance labels come from properties with label_options.participates=true

description.en: A more specific type of the parent entity
Relationship between two entity types

roles.name: source_role
roles._comment: Role name used in computations and schemas

universals._taxonomy_comment: Taxonomy classifies this relator as a type of foundational relator. Use generalization-relator as relator_universal_id. target_universal_id is one of: composition-relator, aggregation-relator, association-relator, generalization-relator, participation-relator, causation-relator, dependency-relator, attribution-relator, parthood-relator, role-assignment-relator, derivation-relator, collaboration-relator. See concepts/architecture/explicit_relator_types.html

description.en: The name of the entity

_notes: predicates: semantic tags for the property
cardinality.min=1 means required, min=0 means optional
cardinality.max=1 means single value, max=null means unlimited
label_options: configures this property's participation in instance labels
participates: true to include this property's value in the label
sequence: order position in the label (1, 2, 3... - lower numbers first)
prefix: optional string prepended to value (e.g., '#' for invoice numbers)
suffix: optional string appended to value

description.en: The name/code for this enumeration value

_notes: For enumeration universals, use Categorical type with simple string values
Instance property values are simple strings: 'ACTIVE', 'PENDING', 'HIGH'
Do NOT use Textual type for enum names - Textual is for multilingual content
label_options.participates=true ensures enum instances display their name as label

description.en: Current status of the entity
Monetary amount

_notes: Standard measurement frames: std-currency, std-quantity, std-integer, std-ratio, std-float
Or reference your custom measurement_frame id

description.en: Calendar date without time component (ISO 8601, e.g. 2024-03-15)

_notes: Date type renders as HTML5 date picker in the App Runtime form
Values stored as ISO 8601 date strings: '2024-03-15'
For date+time values, use DateTime type instead

description.en: Date and time value in UTC (RFC 3339, e.g. 2024-03-15T10:30:00Z)

_notes: DateTime type renders as HTML5 datetime-local picker in the App Runtime form
Values stored as RFC 3339 UTC strings: '2024-03-15T10:30:00Z'
Timezone-less values are rejected; all values normalized to UTC
For date-only values without time, use Date type instead

description.en: Event emitted when a new entity is created

_notes: scope: 'tenant' (within tenant), 'org' (organization-wide), 'explicit' (specified targets)
distribution_scope: 'local' (in-process), 'cluster' (all nodes), 'hybrid' (local + cross-tenant)
default_routing_mode: 'broadcast' (all subscribers), 'unicast' (one subscriber), 'balanced' (round-robin)
default_ttl_ms: optional message expiration time in milliseconds
default_consumer_group: optional consumer group name for balanced routing
field_type options: uuid, string, integer, float, number, boolean, timestamp, json, measurement
measurement_frame required when field_type is 'measurement'

description.en: Command event sent to a specific subscriber
Work item distributed round-robin across worker pool
Correlates submission with approval/rejection events

_notes: expression.type: 'All' (all events required), 'Any' (any one event), 'Event' (leaf node referencing an event type)
expression.expressions: nested expressions for complex logic (All/Any can contain Event or nested All/Any)
expression[].alias: name for this event in the correlation session
correlation_key_path: JSON path in event payload used to group correlated events
session_instantiation.mode: 'OnAnyEvent' (create session on first matching event)
session_reset.mode: 'Automatic' (reset after completion)
timeout.duration.ms: timeout in milliseconds (e.g., 86400000 = 24 hours)
timeout.on_timeout.type: 'EmitTimeoutEvent' (emit event on timeout)
on_complete.type: 'EmitEvent' (emit event when all conditions met)
on_complete.payload_strategy: 'MergeAll' (merge all event payloads into completion event)

timers.name: Timer Display Name
_notes: schedule.type: 'Interval' (fixed delay) or 'Cron' (cron expression)
schedule.unit: 'Seconds', 'Minutes', 'Hours', 'Days'
schedule.recurring: false = one-shot, true = repeating
event_emission.event_code: seed of the EventDefinition to emit when fired
auto_start: if true, timer starts automatically after metadata load
Timer publishes to topic 'events.timer.{timer_uuid}' at runtime
To subscribe a computation, use TopicMessage trigger: 'events.timer.{timer-seed}'

description.en: Computes total = quantity * unit_price

computations.formula: let qty = quantity.value; let price = unit_price.value; qty * price
_notes: formula: Rhai script expression. Access input values via variable_name.value
trigger_conditions: Multiple triggers use OR semantics (fire when ANY condition is met)
For AND semantics (wait for multiple events), use Correlation Rules instead
priority: 'High', 'Normal', 'Low'

description.en: Sums property values across related entities

_notes: role_aggregate source: aggregates values from related entities
function options: Sum, Count, Avg, Min, Max

computations._comment: === ROLE PROPERTY COMPUTATION (single related entity property) ===

description.en: Reads a property from a related entity via relator

computations.formula: let local = local_value.value; let related = related_value.value; local + related
_notes: role_property source: reads a single property from a related entity
relator_id: the relator universal defining the relationship
target_role: which role to navigate to (the related entity's role name)
property_id: the property to read from the related entity

description.en: Handles incoming events
Emits event when property changes
Uses data schema for complex data extraction

computations.formula: let data = entity_data; if data.item_count > 0 { 1.0 } else { 0.0 }

description.en: Triggered when an artifact measure value changes

computations.formula: let old_val = old_value.value; let new_val = new_value.value; print(`Changed from ${old_val} to ${new_val}`); 0.0

description.en: Triggered by timer, emits a report event

computations.formula: let result = ScriptResult(true); result.log("info", "Timer fired - processing"); result.emit("report", #{ status: "done" }); result

description.en: Publishes report after timer processing

_notes: Timer-triggered: use 'events.timer.{timer-seed}' as topic (loader resolves seed to UUID)
output_event_types: maps formula emit() names to event definition IDs
event_bindings.scope: 'tenant' limits event scope, optional with description
formula uses ScriptResult: result.emit('name', payload) to emit events

description.en: Triggered when a new instance of the entity type is created

computations.formula: let result = ScriptResult(true); result.log("info", "Instance created"); result
_notes: InstanceLifecycle trigger: fires on instance lifecycle events for a given universal
lifecycle: 'Created' (new instance), 'Modified' (property changed), 'Deleted' (instance removed)
universal_id: the seed of the universal type to monitor

description.en: Triggered when any property of the entity instance changes

computations.formula: let result = ScriptResult(true); result.log("info", "Instance modified"); result

description.en: Triggered when a new relator instance is established

computations.formula: let result = ScriptResult(true); result.log("info", "Relator created"); result
_notes: RelatorLifecycle trigger: fires on relator instance lifecycle events
lifecycle: 'Created' (new relator instance), 'Modified' (relator changed), 'Deleted' (relator removed)
relator_universal_id: the seed of the relator universal type to monitor

description.en: Triggered when a relator instance is modified

computations.formula: let result = ScriptResult(true); result.log("info", "Relator modified"); result

description.en: Triggered when a property transitions from one specific value to another

computations.formula: let result = ScriptResult(true); result.log("info", "State transition detected"); result
_notes: StateTransition trigger: fires when a property value changes from one value to another
property_id: the seed of the property definition to monitor
from_value: the previous value (optional - omit to match any previous value)
to_value: the new value (optional - omit to match any new value)
Values are typically Categorical strings matching allowed_values in the property definition

description.en: Complete entity with related data

_notes: Data schemas define how to extract structured data from instances
source.type options: Context, Property, Relation, Aggregate
context_field options: InstanceId, TenantId, UniversalId

artifact_definitions.name: Summary by Category

description.en: Aggregated data grouped by category dimension

dimensions._comment2: Each path step can include 'disable_transitive_closure: true' to suppress automatic transitive expansion for transitive relators (Parthood, Generalization, Causation). Default is false. This field is for JSON editing only — not exposed in Studio UI since the path browser already lets users select explicit paths.

measures._comment: Count doesn't need property_id - counts instances

thresholds._comment: operator options: GreaterThan, LessThan, Equals, GreaterThanOrEqual, LessThanOrEqual

_notes: Artifacts are pre-computed aggregations (like materialized views)
source.universal_id: the entity type being aggregated
artifact_universal_id: the summary entity type for storing results
materialization.strategy: 'Eager' (immediate) or 'Lazy' (on-demand)

score_definitions._comment: === PERCENTILE RANK SCORE (compares entity value against artifact population) ===
score_definitions.name: Value Percentile

description.en: Entity value percentile rank compared against the population from an artifact measure

_notes: source_universal_id: the entity type being scored
artifact_binding: links to an artifact definition and its measure for population data
entity_value_binding.resolve_from.type: 'DirectProperty' (own property) or 'RelatorPathProperty' (navigate relator chain)
method.type: 'PercentileRank' (rank against population) or 'Composite' (weighted combination of other scores)
thresholds[].condition.operator: 'LessThan', 'GreaterThan', 'LessThanOrEqual', 'GreaterThanOrEqual', 'Equals'
thresholds[].event_type_id: event definition to emit when threshold is crossed

score_definitions._comment: === RELATOR PATH SCORE (navigate relationships to find entity value) ===
score_definitions.name: Related Value Percentile

description.en: Score based on a property reached via relator navigation

score_definitions._comment: === COMPOSITE SCORE (weighted combination of other scores) ===
score_definitions.name: Composite Score

description.en: Weighted combination of multiple base scores

_notes: Composite scores combine multiple base scores with weights
artifact_binding and entity_value_binding use nil UUIDs (not used for composites)
method.inputs[].score_definition_id: references other score definitions
method.inputs[].variable_name: name for the score in the composite formula
method.inputs[].weight: weight factor (all weights should sum to 1.0)

description.en: Property change events are processed locally only

_notes: pattern: Topic prefix to match (ending with : or . for prefix match)
scope: 'local' (in-process only), 'cluster' (distributed to cluster), 'hybrid' (local + cluster)

description.en: Application events are distributed across the cluster

_notes: authorization.require_app_permission: if true, validates app has Subscribe/Publish permission
authorization.allowed_actions: list of allowed actions (Subscribe, Publish, Read, Write, Compute)
outbound.channel_id: identifier for the outbound channel (for distributed delivery)

description.en: Computation events processed locally first, then distributed
Role change events processed locally for reactive computations
Relator change events processed locally

_schema_notes.use_seed: When true, generates deterministic UUID from id string using namespace. Required for cross-file references.
_schema_notes.label_format: Always use multilingual format: { "en": "English text", "es": "Spanish text" }
trigger_condition_types: PropertyChange: triggered when property value changes { property_id }
TopicMessage: triggered by broker topic message { topic }
ArtifactMeasureChanged: triggered when artifact measure value changes { artifact_definition_id, measure_id }
InstanceLifecycle: triggered on instance lifecycle events { universal_id, lifecycle: Created|Modified|Deleted }
RelatorLifecycle: triggered on relator lifecycle events { relator_universal_id, lifecycle: Created|Modified|Deleted }
StateTransition: triggered when property transitions between values { property_id, from_value?, to_value? }
timer_topic_format: In metadata, use 'events.timer.{timer-seed}' - the loader resolves the seed to UUID
event_emission.event_code references an EventDefinition seed for validation
topic_policy_scopes: local: Events processed only within the local broker instance (in-process)
cluster: Events distributed to all broker nodes in the cluster
hybrid: Events processed locally first, then distributed to cluster
topic_policy_patterns: Pattern must end with ':' or '.' for prefix matching
More specific patterns take precedence over general patterns
authorization_actions: Subscribe: Permission to subscribe to topic events
Publish: Permission to publish events to topic

instance_label_framework.description: Instance labels are generated from property values at read-time, not stored
universal_label_schema: separator: string to join label parts (default: ' - ')
max_length: maximum label length before truncation (default: 40)
fallback_language: language to use if requested not found (default: 'en')
property_label_options: participates: true to include property value in label
prefix: optional string prepended to value
suffix: optional string appended to value
instance_label_framework.example: Universal with label_schema + Properties with label_options.participates=true + sequence ordering

property_value_types.Categorical: Simple string value: 'ACTIVE', 'INV-001' - for enum codes, identifiers
property_value_types.Measurement: Value with unit: { 'value': 100, 'unit': 'usd' } - for numeric values
property_value_types.Date: ISO 8601 date string: '2024-03-15' - for calendar dates without time
property_value_types.DateTime: RFC 3339 UTC string: '2024-03-15T10:30:00Z' - for date+time values
property_value_types._warning: Do NOT use Textual format { 'en': 'value' } for Categorical properties - causes loading errors

data_file_separation.metadata_app.json: Schema definitions: universals, property_definitions, computations, events, users, role_assignments, etc.
data_file_separation._note: Never put instances in metadata_app.json - schema and data must be separate

user_roles: AppAdmin: Full access to application entities and settings
AppDeveloper: Can define and modify application schema (universals, computations, etc.)
AppUser: Standard application user with read/write access to instances
TenantAdmin: Can manage tenant-level settings and users
OrgAdmin: Can manage organization-level settings and tenants
role_assignment_scopes: App: { type: 'App', tenant_id: '...', app_id: '...' } - access to specific app
Tenant: { type: 'Tenant', tenant_id: '...' } - access to all apps in tenant
Organization: { type: 'Organization', org_id: '...' } - access to all tenants in org
score_definition_methods: PercentileRank: ranks entity value against artifact population (0-100 percentile)
Composite: weighted combination of other score definitions (weights should sum to 1.0)
score_entity_value_binding_types: DirectProperty: { type: 'DirectProperty', property_id: '...' } - reads property directly from entity
RelatorPathProperty: { type: 'RelatorPathProperty', path: [...], property_id: '...' } - navigates relators to reach property
correlation_rule_expression_types: All: all sub-expressions must be satisfied (AND logic)
Any: at least one sub-expression must be satisfied (OR logic)
Event: leaf node referencing a specific event_type_id with an alias
top_level_key_order: organizations, tenants, users, foundation_role_assignments, apps, measurement_frames,
